title: Chores
scope: Recurring household chores rotated across the kids — replaces the family chore-manager spreadsheet. A daily 9am push gives each kid their chores, with kid-driven check-off and full chore/zone/kid CRUD via UI and chat. NOT general task management (the Todo/Tasks apps); chores are the fixed, rotating household duties.

specs.title: Today's chores
specs.behavior: Showing today's chores lists each kid's chore assignments for the current day.

specs.title: Weekly chore strip
specs.behavior: The weekly strip returns a kid's 7-day chore view (or every kid's, when none is named).

specs.title: Completion history
specs.behavior: History shows completion records for a kid (or everyone) over a date range.

specs.title: Complete a chore
specs.behavior: Completing marks a chore done for a kid on a specific date.

specs.title: Un-check a chore
specs.behavior: Un-checking reverses a previously recorded completion.

specs.title: List kids
specs.behavior: Listing returns the active kids in the chore rotation.

specs.title: Add a kid
specs.behavior: Adding a kid puts them into the rotation (parent only).

specs.title: Update a kid
specs.behavior: Updating changes a kid's fields, leaving unspecified fields unchanged (parent only).

specs.title: Remove a kid
specs.behavior: Removing soft-deletes a kid while preserving their completion history (parent only).

specs.title: List zones
specs.behavior: Listing returns all zones with their members and chore counts.

specs.title: Show a zone
specs.behavior: Showing a zone returns its members and the day-of-week × position chore grid.

specs.title: Add a zone
specs.behavior: Adding creates a new chore zone (parent only).

specs.title: Update a zone
specs.behavior: Updating changes a zone's fields (parent only).

specs.title: Remove a zone
specs.behavior: Removing deletes a zone and its chores (parent only); it fails if completion history references those chores.

specs.title: Add a chore
specs.behavior: Adding inserts a chore slot into a zone.

specs.title: Remove a chore
specs.behavior: Removing soft-deletes a chore (parent only); old completions are preserved.
